findings.title: EngineeringWorkflow application namespace leaks into Api contracts
findings.description: Multiple files under AssistantEngineer.Modules.EngineeringWorkflow/Application use AssistantEngineer.Api namespaces/contracts, weakening clean module boundaries and DDD language separation.
findings.recommendation: Create a staged namespace and contract relocation plan so module application abstractions no longer depend on Api naming/contracts.
findings.riskIfIgnored: Boundary erosion increases coupling and raises cost/risk of future refactors and runtime changes.

findings.title: Module boundary tests do not include EngineeringWorkflow assembly
findings.description: ModuleBoundaryTests currently validate several modules but omit explicit EngineeringWorkflow module coverage.
findings.recommendation: Extend module-boundary coverage to include EngineeringWorkflow assembly and key forbidden dependencies.
findings.riskIfIgnored: Dependency leaks in EngineeringWorkflow can remain undetected by architecture tests.

findings.title: ProtectedEndpointAuthorizationGate is a maintainability hotspot
findings.description: Authorization gate file size and concern breadth suggest mixed responsibilities and long-term change risk.
findings.recommendation: Plan decomposition into smaller policy/resolution/message components while preserving behavior.
findings.riskIfIgnored: Policy changes may become risky and regressions harder to isolate.

findings.title: OwnershipBackfillCommandLineParser is oversized
findings.description: CLI parser centralizes command parsing and validation branches in a single large file.
findings.recommendation: Split parser by command families with shared validation helpers and lock behavior via tests.
findings.riskIfIgnored: Small UX/validation changes can cause unintended side effects across commands.

findings.title: Route inventory still has deferred/unknown classification backlog
findings.description: Route inventory currently contains deferred and unknown classification entries requiring staged completion.
findings.recommendation: Prioritize deferred endpoint classification closure in staged governance work.
findings.riskIfIgnored: Protection-stage visibility can drift as new endpoints evolve.

findings.title: Wrapper script surface is large relative to tool commands
findings.description: Many scripts are useful wrappers around C# tools but increase maintenance surface and ownership complexity.
findings.recommendation: Introduce scripts-to-tools ownership map and consolidation candidates while keeping critical wrappers.
findings.riskIfIgnored: Operational drift and duplicated command behavior may increase over time.

findings.title: Governance tests still include wording-fragile assertions
findings.description: Large governance suite includes many phrase/section checks that are useful but brittle to benign documentation edits.
findings.recommendation: Continue consolidation toward semantic assertions and shared helpers for brittle patterns.
findings.riskIfIgnored: Maintenance friction and noisy test failures can slow safe documentation updates.

findings.title: EngineeringWorkflow controller partial surface remains large
findings.description: Workflow controller partial files remain sizable and mix different endpoint concerns.
findings.recommendation: Plan endpoint orchestration split and clearer application-service boundaries in a dedicated refactor stage.
findings.riskIfIgnored: Controller evolution can become slower and more regression-prone.

findings.title: EnergyPlus fixture authoring contains placeholder TODO metadata
findings.description: Fixture authoring tool includes explicit TODO placeholders for provenance fields.
findings.recommendation: Backfill placeholder provenance fields with explicit template/default policy.
findings.riskIfIgnored: Generated fixture metadata can remain inconsistent across contributors.

findings.title: Production readiness inventory contains very long staged status text
findings.description: Large repeated stage narrative in readiness inventory increases drift risk despite index normalization.
findings.recommendation: Introduce compact linked status blocks for long stage chains in a docs-only cleanup.
findings.riskIfIgnored: Status drift and review overhead increase with each stage update.

recommendedBacklog.title: EngineeringWorkflow boundary and naming hardening plan
recommendedBacklog.goal: Restore clean module boundary by removing Api namespace leakage from EngineeringWorkflow application contracts and services.
recommendedBacklog.risk: Boundary coupling will continue to grow if not addressed early.

recommendedBacklog.title: Architecture boundary coverage expansion
recommendedBacklog.goal: Extend architecture tests to cover EngineeringWorkflow module boundary and explicit dependency constraints.

recommendedBacklog.title: Workflow and authorization hotspot decomposition design
recommendedBacklog.goal: Prepare safe decomposition plan for oversized authorization/workflow controller/application orchestration hotspots.
recommendedBacklog.risk: Hotspots can block future feature work and raise regression risk.

recommendedBacklog.title: OwnershipBackfill CLI parser simplification
recommendedBacklog.goal: Reduce parser complexity while preserving command semantics, exit codes, and redaction behavior.
recommendedBacklog.risk: CLI behavior changes may regress without staged behavior-lock refactor.

recommendedBacklog.title: Route inventory deferred classification closure
recommendedBacklog.goal: Reduce unknown/deferred route classification entries with explicit stage mapping and limitations.
recommendedBacklog.risk: Governance visibility can drift from runtime endpoint growth.

recommendedBacklog.title: Scripts/tools rationalization
recommendedBacklog.goal: Classify wrappers versus native tools and remove avoidable overlap in operator entry points.
recommendedBacklog.risk: Operational complexity grows with duplicate wrappers.

recommendedBacklog.title: Engineering terminology and claim-surface cleanup
recommendedBacklog.goal: Tighten terminology consistency and reduce long repeated status text across architecture/security docs.
recommendedBacklog.risk: Claim drift and review friction remain high.

recommendedBacklog.title: Governance test brittleness reduction phase 2
recommendedBacklog.goal: Further reduce wording-coupled tests while preserving safety guardrails and explicit non-claims checks.
recommendedBacklog.risk: Doc updates continue to trigger noisy failures with low semantic value.

nonClaims: No external standard-case validation completion claim.
No DB RLS/global EF query filter claim.
